description: Execute a formal validation protocol for the Noninvasive Blood Pressure (NIBP) simulated device. Using the OpenICE Supervisor and Vital Signs application, capture a screenshot of a completed NIBP reading to /home/ga/Desktop/nibp_reading_captured.png. Record the systolic and diastolic values in the format 'Systolic: [Value] mmHg, Diastolic: [Value] mmHg' to /home/ga/Desktop/nibp_values.txt. Close the Vital Signs application after recording the data.
